title: Yankee Candle Home Inspiration Strawberry Waffle Cone Scented Jar Candle, 104g, 8.5 x 6 cm Glass Container
features: AUTHENTIC YANKEE CANDLE: Home Inspiration collection featuring Strawberry Waffle Cone fragrance in a 104g glass jar candle for delightful home ambiance
DELECTABLE SCENT: Sweet strawberry ice cream and crispy waffle cone fragrance creates an irresistible dessert-inspired aroma
COMPACT SIZE: Perfect 8.5 cm height and 6 cm diameter glass jar ideal for any room or desktop placement
QUALITY DESIGN: Classic jar shape with tight-fitting glass lid helps preserve fragrance when not in use
LONG-LASTING: Premium-quality wax blend provides consistent fragrance release throughout the entire burn time
description: Transform your space with the delightful aroma of Yankee Candle's Home Inspiration Strawberry Waffle Cone scented candle. This charming 104g candle comes in a compact glass jar measuring 8.5 cm in height and 6 cm in diameter, perfect for any room. The inviting fragrance captures the essence of a sweet summer treat, combining the mouthwatering scents of fresh strawberries and crispy waffle cone. The classic jar design features a tight-fitting lid to preserve the fragrance when not in use. Each burn releases consistent fragrance throughout the candle's life, creating a warm and welcoming atmosphere in your home. The convenient size makes it ideal for placing on bedside tables, bathroom counters, or office desks. Experience the joy of this dessert-inspired scent that brings the delightful aroma of an ice cream parlour into your living space.
